_publications._publicationTitle: A single-cell atlas of Schwannoma across genetic backgrounds and anatomic locations.

_contextSnippet: To further evaluate this finding, we performed immunohistochemistry staining for MHC class I and II proteins in schwannomas and other tumors. Quantification of the relative intensity of staining demonstrated higher MHC class II staining when compared to MHC class I (p = 0.0086)
details: Used for immunohistochemistry staining; quantification showed higher MHC class II staining compared to MHC class I in schwannomas (p = 0.0086)
